headline: Transcript: Quizmas special — Political Fix’s nerd out!
summary: Lucy Fisher tests Robert Shrimsley, Jim Pickard, Stephen Bush, George Parker and Miranda Green
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the Political Fix podcast episode: ‘Quizmas special — Political Fix’s nerd out!’

(Overlapping speech) Right? Crackers.

(Overlapping speech) Yeah. One, two, three. Hooray!

Jim PickardYes!

[MUSIC PLAYING]

Lucy Fisher Hello and welcome to a special festive quiz edition of Political Fix from the Financial Times with me, Lucy Fisher. And here with me in the studio is the entire Political Fix core team: Robert Shrimsley, Miranda Green, Stephen Bush, George Parker and Jim Pickard. Hello!

(Overlapping speech) Hello!

Miranda Green(Singing) Happy Christmas.

Lucy Fisher More singing throughout the episode, please, Miranda.

[MUSIC PLAYING]

The studio is bedecked in tinsel. We’ve got delicious mince pies on hand and it may not be noon, but the mulled wine is already flowing, so dig in. We’re going to be looking back at a pretty seminal year in British politics with a fiendish quiz. My glamorous assistant, Manuela, in the gallery will be doing the scoring. No
